title: Abdominal imaging result review

red_flags.text: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.
red_flags.rationale: The exact section supports clinician-assessed severe pain, fever, vomiting, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy and shock context without asserting absence or urgency.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

red_flags.text: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.
red_flags.rationale: The exact referral context supports documenting a clinician-entered plan, safety net and follow-up without generating referral or urgency.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

investigations.text: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.
investigations.rationale: The exact UAE adult section supports documenting the symptom context prompting result review, interval course, associated gastrointestinal, urinary or gynaecological symptoms, exposures and functional impact without interpreting the image.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

investigations.text: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.
investigations.rationale: The exact section supports recording that an imaging report or laboratory result was already reviewed by the clinician; it does not interpret the finding or order further tests.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

source_limitations: Result source and date, exact report text, incidental findings, comparison, clinician interpretation, diagnosis, action, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
